# Repository Structure Rules

This repository follows a structured layout for development and documentation.

## Main directories

ISME_BE
Backend application source code.

ISMS_FE
Frontend application source code.

docs
Contains official project documentation.

_bmad-output
Contains temporary analysis and draft documents generated by AI agents.

.github
Contains AI agent configurations and workflow rules.

## Documentation directories

docs/template
Contains approved document templates.

Agents must read templates from this folder.

docs/output
Contains finalized documents generated during development.

Agents are allowed to create or update files here.

## AI workspace

_bmad-output
Contains intermediate analysis documents such as:

- repo-analysis.md
- prd-draft.md
- architecture-notes.md
- backlog-draft.md

Agents must not treat this folder as official documentation.
